description: A photograph of two handguns laid on a dark surface below a printed Customs and Border Protection placard. The placard shows the agency seal and text reading U.S. Customs and Border Protection, Port of Buffalo, NY. The firearms are a long-barreled revolver with its cylinder swung out on the left and a short-barreled revolver with a wood grip on the right.
notable_text: U.S. CUSTOMS AND BORDER PROTECTION; Port of Buffalo, NY
